title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents three rules for building successfully with Claude Code, grounded in Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan's principles. The video outlines what not to build, what to build, and six moves for becoming an AI team leader, with a four-question test to validate projects before starting.
